subset_definitions.agreement: tree and logistic choose the same transfer-side expert; evaluate the corresponding agreed retained/QA expert directly
subset_definitions.agreement_semantic: agreement subset where both routers choose the retained semantic+audio expert
subset_definitions.agreement_qa: agreement subset where both routers choose the QA benchmark expert
subset_definitions.disagreement: tree and logistic disagree; compare whether abstaining to pre_call_market_only is safest
